name: §6Witch
description:
§8Alchemy Pet

§7Intelligence: §b100
§7Alchemy Wisdom: §3[Alchemy Wisdom]

§6Toil and Trouble
§7Increases your chance of dropping
§6Ingredients§7 during the §5Year of the
§5Witch§7 by §a100%§7.

§6Alchemism
§7Reduces how long §5Potions§7 take to
§7brew by §a50%§7.

§6Witching Hour
§7Increases the base stats of this pet
§7by §a100%§7 during the §5Year of the Witch§7.

§eRight-click to add this pet to your
§epet menu!

§6§lLEGENDARY
